verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable answer immediately: "Turn on automated backups today"; A starts with "Confirm reality first" and then surveys multiple stores.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to one highest-stakes path: "Aurora PostgreSQL (production) — do this first"; A spreads priority across "Aurora," "Supabase," "Neo4j," and "PostHog."
verdict.fabrication: Both invent context, but A invents more system details: "Aurora PostgreSQL — crown jewels (revenue/users/UTM)," "Supabase (ads)," "Neo4j knowledge graph," and "PostHog."
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives a short ordered sequence: automated backups, manual snapshot, RPO/RTO, logical dump, restore test.
